title: 0402 Admin Assistant/School/West Coast
description:
School name

Commonwealth Secondary School

Contract period

  • Contract Period: From 01 Apr 2026 to 31 Mar 2027.
  • Option to Extend: The Contractor grants the Authority the option to extend the Contract for a further period of 01 Apr 2027 to 31 Mar 2028. The Authority shall have full discretion to exercise this option, in whole or in parts, and in as many phases as it deems fit, by issuing written notice(s) to the Contractor at any time before the expiration of any subsisting Contract Period. Unless otherwise specifically agreed between the Parties, any Services rendered during the extended period shall be subject to the same terms and conditions (inclusive of any amendments) of the Contract.

Working hour

  • Mondays to Thursdays: 9:30am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5 hr lunch break.
  • Fridays: 10 am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5 hr lunch break.
  • Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays.

Job scopes

The scope of services required are set out as follows:

  1. Front desk reception duties such as answering/ transferring phone calls and attending to walk-in parents/students/vendors.
  2. Issuing of keys to staff if require the use of special rooms.
  3. Record details of students and attend to students who are unwell at sickbay.
  4. Contact parents to update student who is unwell.
  5. Record details of students who leave school early due to sickness and/or have medical appointment and ensure that Early Dismissal form is completed.
  6. Record details of lost & found Items in the Lost & Found form and track movements at the end of every school term.
  7. Receive delivery items and inform staff on collection from General Office.
  8. Collate list of students who have not collected their testimonials.
  9. Manage the movement of school uniform on loan to students.
  10. Distribute the mailers and any other materials required.
  11. Prepare and count food coupons for payment if required.
  12. Perform any ad-hoc administrative duties when required.

Requirements

Qualification, Skill & Experience of the Contractor's Personnel

  • Qualifications and skills: Full GCE ‘N’ Level Certificate or its equivalent with a pass in English; Valid first aid with CPR certification; Proficient with Microsoft Office; Good communication and inter-personal skills with patience and ability to remain calm during challenging situations; Possess initiative, good problem-solving skills and ability to multitask; Able to work independently and collaborate in a team.
  • Experience: 3 years of similar working experience in a school environment; Minimally 3 years of relevant experience in administration.

postedCompany.description:
MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
